name: golang-github-golang-mock-dev
title: golang-github-golang-mock-dev
summary: mocking framework for the Go programming language
description:
mocking framework for the Go programming language
GoMock is a mocking framework for the Go programming language.
It integrates well with Go's built-in testing package, but can be used in
other contexts too.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-golang-mock-dev because mocking framework for the Go programming language.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-golang-mock-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-golang-mock-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-golang-mock-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
